title: TidyZ 240 DOGGY BAGS WITH TIE HANDLES, POCKET PACK, RAINBOW COLOURS (12 rolls of 20 bags)
features: *AIL is the product manufacturer and distributor. To ensure product quality please purchase from "sold by AIL UK"*
Handy compact rolls ideal for your coat or trouser pockets
Tie Handles - Easy To Tie, carry, and dispose of hygienically
Perforated on a roll for easy dispensing
Bag Measurements: 32cm Open width x 36cm Long including tie handles
description: *AIL are the TidyZ Brand Product Manufacturer and Distributor. To ensure product authenticity please purchase from "sold by AIL UK"* These really handy rolls are perfect when you're out and about. Compact rolls, yet still with tie handles, the size and strength are perfect for clearing up after your pet conveniently and hygienically. These bright and fashionable rolls certainly make the chore of clearing up after your pet less dull! Brilliant value bags at a fraction of the cost of many comparable options.
